evals.prompt: 我想要幫我們的部落格網站建一個 fixture。網站有首頁、文章列表頁（/blog）、還有個別文章頁（/blog/<slug>）。文章大概有 50 篇。首頁和文章列表都在 Header Nav 裡面。
evals.expected_output: JSON fixture with at least 3 nodes (homepage, /blog, /blog/<slug>), edges connecting them, isGlobal+placements on homepage and /blog, saved to fixture-*.json

evals.prompt: 幫我建一個電商網站的 fixture。有首頁、產品列表 /products、分類頁 /products/<category>、和產品詳細頁 /products/<category>/<id>。分類大概有 8 個，Header 有首頁和產品列表的連結。我也想把產品相關頁面打上 products 這個 tag。
evals.expected_output: JSON fixture with 4+ nodes for e-commerce, products tag on product nodes, placements on isGlobal nodes, edges showing product hierarchy

evals.prompt: I need to create a site fixture for our company website. We have: a homepage, an about page (/about), a services section (/services) with individual service pages (/services/<slug>), and a contact page (/contact). Header links to homepage, about, services, and contact. Footer only has about and contact.
evals.expected_output: JSON fixture with 5 nodes, both Header and Footer placements on relevant global nodes, services tag or similar grouping, edges reflecting navigation
